tasks.label: Run Robot tests
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $api = Start-Process -FilePath node -ArgumentList 'src/server.js' -WorkingDirectory 'c:\Projetos\pgats\planner-api' -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; & 'C:/Users/amand/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python313/python.exe' -m robot -d reports/robot tests; $code=$LASTEXITCODE; Stop-Process -Id $api.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; exit $code
